taxonomy: Paphiopedilum superbiens is a species of terrestrial orchid. It is native to Southeast Asia and belongs to the genus Paphiopedilum. The genus Paphiopedilum is part of the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This family includes approximately 30,000 to 40,000 known species, showcasing the diversity of orchids worldwide.
